programme.title: Operandi Gerhana - EP 1
programme.desc: Singapore. 1955. Gangland crime threatens to swallow Singapore. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - SINGCHOICE Bone Health Formula & Eyes Nourisher
programme.desc: A daily wellness duo that strengthens bones, supports joints, and protects eyesight. Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision. 日常双效保养组合，同时守护筋骨与视力。筋骨丸采用日本贝类萃取钙、鱼胶原蛋白与软骨素，强化骨骼、维持关节灵活；亮目丸精选日本蓝莓、胡萝卜与叶黄素，帮助过滤蓝光、缓解眼睛疲劳，维持清晰视力。天然配方、每日补充，让骨骼稳、关节顺、双眼更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Comvita Honey
programme.desc: Comvita™ 10+ Manuka Honey is a premium honey from New Zealand that supports immunity and aids digestion. Collagen Peptide Manuka Honey Drink supports skin, joint, and bone health while boosting hydration and elasticity. Night Rejuvenating Manuka Honey is the world’s first honey designed to protect the liver with rejuvenating properties that provides detoxification while you sleep. Comvita™ 10+ 麦卢卡蜂蜜是来自新西兰的优质蜂蜜，因其抗菌特性而闻名。它有助于增强免疫力，缓解喉咙痛，并促进消化。胶原蛋白肽麦芦卡蜂蜜饮品有助于皮肤、关节和骨骼健康，同时改善皮肤水分和弹性。刺梨朝鲜蓟麦芦卡蜂蜜饮品是全球首款设计用于保护肝脏的蜂蜜，结合了麦卢卡蜂蜜的益处和修复特性，支持整体健康和帮助睡眠时排毒。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - I-Running X-Fold Exercise Bike
programme.desc: The X-Fold Exercise Bike is a compact, foldable exercise bike designed for small spaces, offering adjustable resistance, an LCD display and Mobile App connectivity for your workout. Its space-saving design makes it ideal for convenient home cardio sessions. I-Running X-Fold折叠运动脚踏车，设计时尚小巧，配有舒适座垫、可调阻力和LCD显示屏，支持手机App连接，适合家庭健身使用。其折叠设计节省空间便于收纳，帮助您在家轻松进行有氧运动，保持体能、身形和肌肉量。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - LAC Brain Speed
programme.desc: Enhance memory, focus, and mental clarity with Phosphatidylserine (PS), Ginkgo, DHA, and Acetyl L-Carnitine. Supports circulation, nerve health, and cognitive performance—just one tablet a day to stay sharp. Perfect for students, busy professionals, and seniors. 富含高浓度PS与脑部所需重要营养，全面激活记忆力、专注力与思维清晰度。结合银杏叶、DHA与乙酰左旋肉碱，促进脑部循环、维持神经活力与专注表现, 适合18岁以上的学生、上班族或长者，每天一颗，为大脑充电.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Mirtogenol Plus+
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ is a clinically tested eye health formula developed by ophthalmologists and scientists from the UK and Italy. Powered by two powerful antioxidants—Pycnogenol® and Mirtoselect®—with Citrus Bioflavonoids, it supports healthy eye pressure, improves microcirculation, and helps protect against daily screen-related eye stress. It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurred vision for clearer, more comfortable vision. Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ 为眼科医生及英意科研团队研发的临床护眼配方，结合两大强效抗氧化成分 Pycnogenol® 法国松树皮与 Mirtoselect® 欧洲蓝莓，并添加柑橘类黄酮，有助改善眼部微循环、支持健康眼压、对抗用眼压力与氧化损伤，缓解眼睛干涩、疲劳与模糊感，让视力更清晰、更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO ePhysio
programme.desc: An upgraded foot reflexology device that helps relieve aches, swelling, and numbness while improving blood circulation. Made in Korea, it uses low-frequency wave technology to gently stimulate muscle movement and support better blood flow. With dual channels for body pads and waist belt, it allows full-body use—helping reduce fatigue, improve circulation, and support overall wellness. OTO e-Physio 电波保健仪，升级版足部理疗设备，有助缓解酸痛、肿胀与麻木，同时促进血液循环。韩国制造，采用低频电波刺激肌肉，帮助带动血流。配备双通道设计，可连接贴片与腰带，实现全身使用，帮助减轻疲劳、改善循环，提升整体健康状态。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Kampo CholesGuard
programme.desc: A premium, natural supplement trusted globally for over 20 years. It helps to manage cholesterol to a healthy level by combining Red Yeast Rice (Monacolin K) with high-activity Nattokinase. Enhanced with Dan Shen and Wild Yam, it helps to support vessel elasticity and reduces heart workload. It is toxin-free and safe for long-term daily use. You could claim a full refund if you do not see results in 30 days. 一款享誉全球20余年的优质天然保健品。它结合了红曲（莫纳可林K）和高活性纳豆激酶，有助于将胆固醇维持在健康水平。添加丹参和野生山药，有助于增强血管弹性，减轻心脏负担。本产品不含毒素，可长期服用，安全可靠。提供30天安心保证，如30天后未见效，全额退款。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tiger Food Jar + Stainless Steel Bottle + Rice Cooker
programme.desc: Tiger, a trusted century-old brand! Vacuum food jars and flasks keep meals and drinks hot or cold for 6 hours—lightweight, leak-proof, and easy to carry, perfect for meal prep or on-the-go. The compact multi-function rice cooker features an ultra-thick inner pot and versatile menus like Eco, Quick Cook, Porridge, Brown Rice, and Cake, keeping rice warm up to 12 hours with evenly cooked, fluffy results—ideal for small families. Tiger百年品牌，值得信赖！Tiger真空焖烧杯和保温壶，冷热食物皆可装，6小时长效保温保冷，轻巧不漏，携带方便，适合备餐或外出使用。Tiger 0.54L 多功能微电脑小电饭锅，内胆加厚，多种烹煮模式：节能、快煮、粥、糙米、蛋糕等，可保温12小时，米饭均匀松软，完美适合小家庭使用。

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to South Africa, where the biggest bull shark ever recorded was caught.

programme.title: River Monsters - Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic Pacific island, an ancient fishing community is being terrorised.

programme.title: River Monsters - Bone Crusher
programme.desc: In the remote Amazon, Jeremy Wade seeks a predator which cannot be caught with a rod.

programme.title: River Monsters - Secrets of the Sea
programme.desc: Jeremy goes behind the scenes and we see what went into the making of a season at sea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mekong Mutilator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to south east Asia's Mekong river in search of a baby-faced killer.

programme.title: River Monsters - Alaska's Cold Water Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates a fatal incident in Alaska - is an unidentified killer at large?

programme.title: River Monsters - Flesh Ripper
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to New Zealand looking for a dangerous creature described 200 years ago.

programme.title: River Monsters - Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous Loch Ness monster.

programme.title: River Monsters: Best of Series 1-5 - Monster Hunting Secrets
programme.desc: A compilation of the best bits from this extreme fishing series.

programme.desc: Another compilation of the best bits from this extreme fishing series.

programme.title: River Monsters: Invisible Killers - River Monsters: Invisible Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade looks at dark and deadly creatures - parasites.

programme.title: All the Way Boys
programme.desc: A pair of conniving bush pilots crash-land in the Peruvian jungle, where they come across a community of diamond miners under the thumb of a greedy speculator.

programme.title: Nine Deaths of the Ninja
programme.desc: A group of drug runners/freedom fighters has kidnapped a busload of tourists in the Philippines and is threatening to kill them all if one of their partners is not released from prison and the government doesn't halt its anti-drug policies. To stop the criminals, a trio of specialist soldiers are called in. Even with all their training, will they be able to stop the terrorists when they begin killing hostages and turning loose their squads of attack midgets?

programme.title: Compañeros
programme.desc: A Swedish arms dealer and a Mexican peon team up to rescue the intellectual leader of the Revolutionary cause, while taking part in numerous misadventures along the way.

Both together rejuvenates your body inside and out, providing vital immunity and menopausal support for women, and gentle, safe care for everyone, ensuring a healthy, youthful glow for all ages.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 260
programme.desc: South Korea's no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 315
programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 297
programme.desc: The bitter melon formula supports natural detoxification, helps balance blood sugar, and promotes healthy metabolism. The cordyceps capsules boost energy, nourish blood health, and strengthen immunity. Carefully formulated with selected herbal extracts and GMP-certified, these supplements are ideal for daily wellness and long-term natural health maintenance.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 304
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 289
programme.desc: Compact, slim, and ready to use straight out of the box. Walk or jog anytime with quiet operation, shock absorption for joint comfort, and adjustable speed and incline. Fold it flat for easy storage—your convenient home fitness solution.

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 10 上山下海过一夜
programme.desc: Penghu boasts stunning basalt and volcanic landscapes, rich with natural and marine treasures. In this episode, the team explores its most unique hidden gems — from rare columnar basalt cliffs and dense stone weir clusters to local delicacies like peanuts stir-fried on cowfish-stone stoves. They dive into Penghu’s blend of ocean beauty and wartime heritage, ending their adventure with an offshore quest to find traces of ancient whales.

programme.title: The Borderless World - EP 2 消失的国界
programme.desc: The news team travels to different continents, interviewing hundreds of countries and cities, providing viewers with materials to understand the world and different perspectives.

programme.title: Red Shoes - EP 30 红色高跟鞋
programme.desc: A story about a heartless mother who betrayed her father and turned away from her sick younger brother for love and desire, and a daughter who dreams of revenge against such mother.

programme.title: Red Shoes - EP 31 红色高跟鞋
programme.desc: A story about a heartless mother who betrayed her father and turned away from her sick younger brother for love and desire, and a daughter who dreams of revenge against such mother.

programme.title: A Good Supper - EP 19 成为饭吧
programme.desc: Jin Yingxin believes that Cui Shujing truly intends to adopt Zhen Qingxiu, leading her to withdraw from the competition. However, Jin Yingxin wins, and before the results are announced, Xu Minjing offers to falsify them if Cui Shuying agrees to give up the adoption.

programme.title: A Good Supper - EP 20 成为饭吧
programme.desc: Under Jin Yingxin's guidance, Li Duojing gets a chef's license and applies for a palace job, where Cui Shujing hires her to use as leverage against Jin Yingxin. Xu Minjing, worries about her son's interest in Jin Yingxin, tries to force her away.

programme.title: The Treasured Voice S6 - EP 3 天赐的声音 第六季
programme.desc: The program engages music partners in collaborative rearrangement and joint performance to exchange skills and creativity. Together, they aim to infuse new energy into Chinese music, allowing audiences to experience emotion and healing through every note and performance. Featuring artistes such as Jane Zhang, Zhang Bi Chen, David Tao, Liu Yu Ning, A-Lin etc.

programme.title: The Sassy Matchmaker - EP 19 媒婆变新娘
programme.desc: YeKang leads his men to attack XingJing gang and AhHuang is badly injured.

programme.title: The Sassy Matchmaker - EP 20 媒婆变新娘
programme.desc: AhNuo explains to NuoLi why Lidi has a deep hatred towards the rebels. A mysterious foreigner helps LiDi, AhNuo and NuoLi to escape.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: The Tale Of Nokdu - EP 4 朝鲜浪漫喜剧–绿豆传
programme.desc: Quan Ludou demonstrates his extraordinary strength to the widows, hoping to join the widow's group for future missions.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 2
programme.desc: Exchanging his corporate image for that of a live streamer, Asri is straddling in unchartered waters. He struggles to find help from his ex-wife, Hani and two home-based sellers who are suspicious of him.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 3
programme.desc: Asri wants to reward Kak Sal and Kak Cik for helping him with Raja Bundle's promo video. Hani is hurt when she mistakenly thinks Asri takes her shopping to reward her. Hani feels it is time to move on. Raja Bundle's business begins to bloom, causing the envious Madi Lambung to collaborate with other HBB sellers and try to sway Asri's customers. Asri is devastated when one of his HBB sellers betrays him and abandons Raja Bundle after Asri confirms a big order.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 4
programme.desc: Ema joins Raja Bundle and manages to boost sales for Asri. In return, Asri helps Ema to care for her son, Omar, who is recovering. Hani starts dating again. Amirul and Asri's relationship strains further after Asri jumps to conclusion and accuses Amirul of being a school bully. Asri announces the opening of Raja Bundle's cloud kitchen, much to the delight of his HBB sellers. When Asri bumps into Madi Lambung, he is shocked by the latter's hostility towards him.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 5
programme.desc: As the Raja Bundle cloud kitchen takes shape, Asri also needs to expand his team while continuing to balance the other aspects of his life. However, a revelation about his ex-wife Hani is bound to surprise him.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 6
programme.desc: When Madi starts selling cheap, Asri and his HBBs must find a way to overcome this challenge. But in trying to do this, they makes promises to their customers which they have trouble fulfilling. Ema and Omar were welcomed by the sudden arrival of an unexpected person.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 7
programme.desc: The HBBs who have left Madi Lambung begin to sell their products with Asri. Asri's former boss notices Asri's booming business and he is thinking of creating a post specially for Asri. Isnin goes snooping around at the cloud kitchen to see how Madi's former sellers are doing but something else catches his eyes. Zafrul sees hope in his relationship with Hani.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 8
programme.desc: Remi brags about his stints in the filming industry to Asri. Meanwhile, Asri has asked his HBBs to reduce his orders. But the HBBs coax him to reduce his prices so that more will buy. Remi wants Ema to stop baking at the cloud kitchen. Kak Sal tells the HBBs that Asri will be leaving them in the lurch. Kak Sal's rambling unknowingly feeds Madi with information of what is happening at Raja Bundle.

programme.title: Haikal Nak Jadi Cef - EP 9
programme.desc: Trouble brews back on the first day of school after the term holidays. Chef Rahmat's food causes Zaidi and Haikal to go to the nurse's office due to a food allergy. Haikal and Zaidi reconciles reluctantly. This causes Chef Rahmat's to close down his stall, this allowing Mariah to open the new stall in school.

programme.title: Makan Viral - EP 1
programme.desc: Makan Viral is a show where the host will travel to various destinations to test various foods and drinks, while meeting interesting people with interesting stories. The trip itself offers an interesting panoramic view with the opportunity to meet personalities who will share their passion for food and lifestyle.

programme.title: Zoom Spain - EP 7
programme.desc: The Zoom series is known as a riveting travel series where a dynamic duo of hosts begins an unforgettable adventure, delving into the history, culture, natural wonders, and culinary delights of a new country. From the bustling streets of ancient cities to the serene beauty of hidden landscapes, they uncover the stories and traditions that define each place.

programme.title: Seoul Cinta - EP 5
programme.desc: When Azra loses Daniel’s cat, tensions erupt, testing their friendship. Later, Daniel plans a trip to Seoul with Raisha to fulfil her request, but only under the conditions she demands.

programme.title: Nona - EP 6

programme.title: Joran Cik Man
programme.desc: An avid angler, Cik Man, spends more time at sea and his itch to fish is stronger than his will to amend broken relationship with his wife and two children. Will he be caught in his own net or emerge as a strong anchor of the household?

programme.title: Sumandak Takes Borneo - EP 6
programme.desc: A fun travelogue featuring Tracie, Dina, and Auni exploring Borneo's diverse cultures, natural beauty, food, and traditions.

programme.title: Staycation With Fattah & Siti - EP 6
programme.desc: A travel adventure series where hosts Fattah and Siti explore the natural beauty, cultural heritage, and hidden gems of Sarawak, Malaysia — from lush rainforests and coastal resorts to traditional Iban and Melanau villages — through immersive local experiences and outdoor adventures.

programme.title: Baby-Sita

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Jujube Essence & Mulberry Puree
programme.desc: Health+ Jujube Essence & Mulberry Puree are crafted as pure juices with no sugar, no water, and no preservatives. Each sachet delivers natural nourishment anytime, anywhere. Jujube helps boost energy, support immunity, improve sleep, and enhance women’s wellness, while mulberry provides rich antioxidants, improves eyes health, and promotes radiant skin. Health+ 红枣原汁 + 桑葚原浆采用纯果汁制作，不加糖、不加水、无防腐剂。每一小包都能随时随地为你补充天然营养。红枣有助提升气血、增强免疫力、改善睡眠、呵护女性健康；桑葚则富含抗氧化成分，有助护眼、促进皮肤亮泽，全面提升你的状态。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Wellsure
programme.desc: A plant-based protein nutritional drink that ensures a balanced intake of nutrients, promoting visible improvements in muscle health, immune resilience, eye health, and digestion. 一种植物性蛋白全营养饮，确保摄取均衡营养，有助于显著改善肌肉健康、增强免疫力、促进眼部健康和消化功能

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Furi Knife Bundle Set
programme.desc: Slice, dice, and chop like a pro with our kitchen knives! 厨房刀片如同专业大厨一般娴熟！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ultimo Kleen 5-in-1 Laundry Pods
programme.desc: Say goodbye to measuring and mess – simply toss in this laundry pod and let it do the rest! 完美结合洗衣、消毒、柔软、除臭及芳香剂的5合1浓缩洗衣凝珠

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Food Steamer
programme.desc: Simplify meal prep with the 2-Tier Stainless Steel Electric Multi Food Steamer. Designed for healthy, fast, and versatile cooking, it allows you to steam veggies, fish, and more simultaneously, preserving nutrients and flavor. Compact and easy to use—perfect for a nutritious lifestyle! 使用双层不锈钢电动多功能蒸锅，轻松做出健康美味的菜肴。专为健康、快捷、灵活的烹饪设计，能同时蒸煮蔬菜、鱼类等食材，最大限度保留营养与原味。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Orofill Golden Serum / Health+ Orofill Revive
programme.desc: Made from 100% pure Tibetan Sea Buckthorn, containing over 190 nutrients. Use the Golden Serum to smooth fine lines, skin problems and wound recovery, while taking the Revive Softgels for anti-aging and and support mucous membranes. Both together rejuvenates your body inside and out, providing vital immunity and menopausal support for women, and gentle, safe care for everyone, ensuring a healthy, youthful glow for all ages. 采用100%纯正西藏沙棘制成，富含190多种营养成分。外用黄金修复液有助于抚平细纹，缓解皮肤问题，加速伤口愈合；口服焕活软胶囊则有助于抗衰老、溃疡愈合，并滋养黏膜。两者结合使用，由内而外焕活身心，提供免疫力支持和女性更年期舒缓，温和安全，呵护健康，令肌肤焕发青春光彩。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO ePhysio
programme.desc: An upgraded foot reflexology device that helps relieve aches, swelling, and numbness while improving blood circulation. Made in Korea, it uses low-frequency wave technology to gently stimulate muscle movement and support better blood flow. With dual channels for body pads and waist belt, it allows full-body use—helping reduce fatigue, improve circulation, and support overall wellness. OTO e-Physio 电波保健仪，升级版足部理疗设备，有助缓解酸痛、肿胀与麻木，同时促进血液循环。韩国制造，采用低频电波刺激肌肉，帮助带动血流。配备双通道设计，可连接贴片与腰带，实现全身使用，帮助减轻疲劳、改善循环，提升整体健康状态。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Kampo Premium Cordyceps & Bitter Melon Triple Cleanse
programme.desc: The bitter melon formula supports natural detoxification, helps balance blood sugar, and promotes healthy metabolism. The cordyceps capsules boost energy, nourish blood health, and strengthen immunity. Carefully formulated with selected herbal extracts and GMP-certified, these supplements are ideal for daily wellness and long-term natural health maintenance. Health+ 日本汉方苦瓜三清素帮你清热解毒、平衡血糖、促进代谢，Health+ 日本汉方至尊虫草胶囊补气养血、提升免疫力和精力。精选草本精华，GMP认证，天天养生也安心，长期调理体质更自然健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - i-Running TM-299 Foldable Treadmill
programme.desc: Compact, slim, and ready to use straight out of the box. Walk or jog anytime with quiet operation, shock absorption for joint comfort, and adjustable speed and incline. Fold it flat for easy storage—your convenient home fitness solution. 轻巧省空间，开箱即用。安静运行、减震护膝，可调速度与坡度，适合快走与慢跑。折叠后薄至12公分，轻松收纳床底或靠墙摆放，让居家运动更轻松自在。
